sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86289" key="presbeu/teira" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρεσβ-εύτειρα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, prop. fem. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πρεσβευτής,</foreign> only metaph., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀσμὴ π.,</foreign> of the scent of hounds, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:464" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.464</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
